general.messageWindowCapHint: Max messages kept in memory per session (50–1000). Older messages are pruned but can be re-fetched by scrolling up.
general.archiveThresholdDaysHint: Sessions inactive for longer than this are automatically archived. The default is 14 days. Changes apply on the next session list load.
general.reopenLastWorkspaceHint: Automatically restore the last active workspace when the app starts.
general.useModifierToSubmitHint: When enabled, press Ctrl+Enter (Windows) or Cmd+Enter (Mac) to submit. Press Enter alone to insert a new line.
general.notificationSoundsHint: Play a sound when Claude needs your response (approval or question) or finishes a task.
general.notificationSoundsVolumeHint: Master volume for all notification sounds.
general.pathConfigHint: Directories added here are prepended to the PATH passed to Claude Code.
general.pathConfigRefreshHint: Shell-captured PATH is refreshed at app startup. Custom paths take effect for new Claude Code sessions immediately.
general.pathConfigInvalidPath: Path must be an absolute path.
general.updaterAutoCheckHint: Periodically check for new versions in the background.

providers.title: LLM Providers
providers.emptyHint: Add a provider to connect to your LLM service.
providers.name: Name
providers.deleteConfirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. The provider will be permanently removed.
providers.saveAnywayMessage: The provider endpoint could not be reached. Save the provider anyway?

workspace.name: Name
workspace.folderPathHint: The workspace folder cannot be changed because Claude Code session history is bound to this path. Changing it would reset existing sessions.
workspace.promptHistoryRetentionDaysHint: How many days to keep sent-prompt history for this workspace. Set to 0 or a negative number to disable pruning. Changes apply the next time the history is loaded.
workspace.boundBotNone: No bot is bound to this workspace.
workspace.sensitiveFileDenylistHint: Glob patterns for files that Normal bot users cannot read. Owner/Admin users are not constrained.

placeholder.contact: Have ideas or requirements? Contact spearwang to share them.
placeholder.pluginRedirect: Plugins manage skills, MCP servers, and hooks. Use the Plugin Manager in the workspace sidebar.

bots.title: Bots
bots.emptyDescription: Create a bot to connect WeCom or Feishu and bind it to workspaces.
bots.deleteConfirm: Delete bot "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
bots.name: Bot name
bots.wecomBotIdRequired: WeCom Bot ID is required when WeCom is enabled.
bots.wecomBotSecretRequired: WeCom Bot Secret is required when creating a bot with WeCom enabled.
bots.feishuAppIdRequired: Feishu App ID is required when Feishu is enabled.
bots.feishuAppSecretRequired: Feishu App Secret is required when creating a bot with Feishu enabled.

wecom.enableBotHint: When enabled, this workspace acts as a WeCom bot endpoint.
wecom.botNameHint: A friendly name for this bot.
wecom.usersEmpty: No WeCom users have messaged this workspace yet.
wecom.userDuplicate: This enterprise userId is already used by another user in this workspace.
wecom.usersResolvePendingDisabled: Configure Corp ID and Corp Secret to enable on-demand resolution.
wecom.botSessionNote: Bot sessions follow this workspace's tool permission policy (see the Permissions tab). Save changes to connect or disconnect.

queue.disabledBannerBody: The queue shows historical proactive messages. New messages will not be delivered until the bot is re-enabled.

wecom.filePromptTemplatePlaceholder: a file named @$file_name$ uploaded by user, if there is skill can process this file, process it with that skill, if no proper skill find, ask user how to handle it.
wecom.filePromptTemplateHint: Prompt pushed to Claude when a file, image, or video is received. Use $file_name$ as placeholder for the file path. Leave empty for default behavior.
wecom.freezeHint: Changes apply to the next bot session, not to active conversations.

posture.label: Posture
posture.allowAllDescription: Every tool is permitted. This is today's behavior.
posture.safeDescription: Read-only tools and the Reply capability are allowed; write, shell, network, and sub-agent tools are denied.
posture.customDescription: Manual configuration of category defaults and per-tool overrides.

fileRead.name: File Read
fileRead.description: Read files and search contents. Includes Read, Glob, Grep.

fileWrite.name: File Write
fileWrite.description: Modify files and notebooks. Includes Edit, Write, NotebookEdit.

network.name: Network
network.description: Fetch external URLs and run web searches. Includes WebFetch, WebSearch.

subagents.name: Sub-agents
subagents.description: Dispatch and manage background agents and tasks. Includes Agent and the Task* family.

reply.name: Reply
reply.description: Send messages back to the WeCom user. Denying this silences the bot — the agent still processes messages but cannot respond.

banner.title: This workspace is running with full tool access
banner.body: This bot was enabled before tool permissions were configurable. It currently allows every tool call. Consider switching to the Safe preset to limit the bot to read-only actions and replies.

saveWarning.title: The bot will be unable to respond
saveWarning.body: Every category including Reply is denied. The bot will still process inbound messages but cannot reply, and Claude tokens will be spent without producing any user-visible output.

saveError.message: Failed to save permission policy. Please try again.

wecom.mcpGapNote: Note: MCP tools and Skills are not gated by this policy. They follow today's allow-all behavior. This is a known audit gap that will be addressed in a future iteration.

adminUsers.label: Admin users
adminUsers.hint: Canonical WeCom user IDs that are treated as administrators. Admins can use all tools, read and write any file inside the workspace, and run any skill. They are not subject to the Bash whitelist.

defaultSkills.label: Default allowed skills
defaultSkills.hint: Skills every bot user is allowed to invoke. Names are normalized to lowercase kebab-case.

adminSkills.label: Admin-only skills
adminSkills.hint: Additional skills only administrator users can invoke.

isolation.freezeHint: Changes apply to the next bot session, not to active conversations.

feishu.enableBotHint: When enabled, this workspace can be bound to a Feishu bot.
feishu.botNameHint: A friendly name for this bot.
feishu.usersEmpty: No Feishu users have messaged this workspace yet.
feishu.botSessionNote: Bot sessions follow this workspace's tool permission policy (see the WeCom Bot > Permissions tab). Save changes to connect or disconnect.

adminUsers.label: Admin users
adminUsers.hint: Feishu user IDs that are allowed to switch the bot's active workspace.

unsavedDialog.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedDialog.message: You have unsaved changes. Save them before closing?

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.scopeProjectDescription: Shared with collaborators in this repository
plugins.scopeLocalDescription: Only for you, in this repository
plugins.browseMarketplaceHint: Browse the marketplace to find and install plugins.
plugins.noAvailableMarketplace: No available plugins — all are installed
plugins.trySearchHint: Try a different search term or check your marketplace connections.

skills.title: Skills
skills.searchHint: Search skills.sh or install from a source URL.
skills.scopeProjectDescription: Shared with collaborators in this repository
skills.noSkillsFound: No skills found in this source

createWorkspace.title: Create Workspace
createWorkspace.subtitle: Set up a new workspace for your project

closeWorkspace.confirmMessage: This workspace has an active session. Closing the tab will stop it.

deleteWorkspace.title: Delete workspace?
deleteWorkspace.warning: This will permanently delete the workspace "{{workspaceName}}" and all of its sessions. This action cannot be undone.
deleteWorkspace.folderUntouched: The workspace folder on disk will not be modified.
deleteWorkspace.inputLabel: Type the workspace name to confirm
